chunks.text: 1 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 184 of 2004 Dated Order with signature of Judge Hearing of Cases 1.For order on CMA No.1652/2004 2.For order on CMA No.1654/2004 3.For order on CMA No.1655/2004 4.For regular hearing Dated 20.03.2024 Mr. Agha Sheeraz Advocate for the Respondent.-.-.-.-.-. The appellant is not appearing since long and this appeal is pending for quite some time. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
